name: QA 893
description:
PCP QA Test No. 893

Exercise fix for RH BZ 1365424 where init script terminates

like-named processes.



Really a test for _get_pids_by_name() from /etc/pcp.env, as invoked

from the pmcd "rc" script.



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform debian10 reproduce

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform debian10 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 893.out.bad)
2c2,3
< Local pmcd count: 1
---
> ./893: 40: ./893: /tmp/893-92983.pmcd/pmcd: Permission denied
> Local pmcd count: 0
3a5,6
> /usr/lib/pcp/bin/pmsignal: 123: kill: No such process
> 
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h c8b243a204dc -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h c8b243a204dc -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h c8b243a204dc -f simple.numfetch
